name: The Republic of Odgen | RPG (remake)
description:
Original universe ✧ The Handmaid's Tale-ish

"blessed be the fruit"

"Nolite te Bastardes Carborundorum, bitches"

After the christian faction, know as Son's of Jacob, lost the 2nd American revolution, everyone thought things would go well, they were wrong, the rise of the new Republic of Odgen changed things, for better or worse, depending on each person.

BIG REMAKE: You choose who user is now, the choice is yours, and now it's ANYPOV 🎉🎉🎉

And yes, this will be my only anypov bot, don't expect much of this from me, I hate it 😊

TW⚠️: possible non-con or dub-con, trauma, torture, mind break, militarism, feminization, grooming, deaths, unfairness, bad things in general.

The first message is just the introduction of the rpg and the caste system, go there with the persona you'll want to use already :)

Y'all really thought I wouldn't come back? I will NEVER let you guys alone! Whomp whomp 😈
creator: HeavenlyGay
